message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

participant "browser" as browser
participant "proxy" as proxy
actor "backend" as backend
database "component_config" as component_config
database "subscription_map" as subscription_map
database "normalized_object_map" as normalized_object_map
database "normalized_object" as normalized_object

browser -> browser : **1** get_state(\n\tconfiguration_name,\n\tgeo_bounding_box\n)
browser -> proxy :
proxy -> backend : **2** +TENANT_HEADER
backend -> component_config : **3** component_config[configuration_name]\n.subscription_usages
component_config --> backend : **4** [ subscription_usage_config ]
backend -> subscription_map : **5** forEach subscription_usage_config.subscription_id
subscription_map --> backend : **6** subscription_map[subscription_id] (= normalized_object_map)
backend -> normalized_object_map : **7** forEach key
normalized_object_map --> backend : **8** normalized_object
backend -> backend : **9** forEach normalized_object:\n\tif object.in(geo_bounding_box):\n\t\tobject.to_dto(\n\t\t\tsubscription_usage_config\n\t\t)
backend -> normalized_object : **10** object_dto
normalized_object --> backend
backend --> proxy : **11** [ object_dto ]
proxy --> browser : **12**

@enduml
```
